# Agent Task Brief (Template)

Use this template to provide structured instructions to an AI agent.

## Objective
*Briefly describe the end goal of the task.*

## Context & Links
- **Related Docs**: [e.g., docs/agents/30-requirements.md]
- **Key Files**: [e.g., src/Dashboard.tsx]
- **Relevant PRs/Issues**: [optional]

## Hard Constraints
- [e.g., Do not add new dependencies]
- [e.g., Must maintain 100% type safety]
- [e.g., Do not modify infrastructure]

## Definition of Done
1. [ ] Requirement 1
2. [ ] Requirement 2
3. [ ] All existing tests pass

## Validation Steps
- [e.g., Run `npm run build`]
- [e.g., Verify the new button appears on the Dashboard]
